CustomField.description: Have the applicable local regulatory authority requirements been met (e.g., approval from bodies governing the medical profession)? Please see Addendum F attached for a non-exclusive list of such local regulatory authorities.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Have the applicable local regulatory authority requirements been met (e.g., approval from bodies governing the medical profession)? Please see Addendum F attached for a non-exclusive list of such local regulatory authorities.
CustomField.label: Local Regulatory Authority Details
